name: The Back Nine Golf | Goodyear, AZ
address: 15367 W McDowell Rd Ste C2, Goodyear, AZ 85395
about: The Back Nine Golf in Goodyear, AZ, is a golf simulator venue that offers an accessible experience for players of all skill levels. The venue provides golf simulation technology in a welcoming environment, making it suitable for both casual play and serious practice. With a focus on convenience and enjoyment, the facility aims to cater to golfers looking to improve their game or have a fun social outing.
why_golfers_like_it: Accessible simulation technology for players of all skill levels
Welcoming environment suitable for both casual play and practice
Ideal for corporate events and family outings

food_and_drink.notes: Bar services with drinks and cocktails

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides golf clubs for use, but you can bring your own if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available on-site, but outside items may be permitted depending on venue policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes can be completed in 1-2 hours depending on simulator settings and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine Golf welcomes families and offers activities suitable for children.
